articles.title: 7 REASONS SAAS PRODUCT TEAMS USE EMBEDDED IPAAS
articles.summary: Do your users keep asking for integrations with their other apps (e.g, CRMs, ERPs, Slack)? In recent years, embedded iPaaS has become a popular alternative [5] to building integrations from scratch (29% of SaaS companies with integrations use it) [6]. Between authentication, learning 3rd party APIs, and building the end-user experience, shipping an integration can easily take 3

articles.title: months*.
articles.summary: This becomes untenable when you need to manage many integrations, and the maintenance compounds as you add more integrations. Embedded iPaaS solutions, such as Paragon, [5] were designed to address this challenge.

articles.title: THE ERA OF ABUNDANCE
articles.summary: An overview of how AI will transform consumer technology from a16z. Their prediction is that consumers will experience abundance in creativity and productivity, in their relationships and social experiences, and in personal growth across dimensions like education, wellness, and financial health.

articles.title: SORA, GROQ, AND VIRTUAL REALITY
articles.summary: This article discusses the evolution of terms like virtual reality and augmented reality, ultimately endorsing "Metaverse" for its expansive, interconnected network qualities. It explores GenAI's role in realizing this vision and highlights technological advances and challenges in creating a seamless immersive 3D internet.

articles.title: LESSONS ON GOING MULTI-PRODUCT FROM AN EARLY STRIPE PM
articles.summary: Excellence isn't solely about creating the best product - you have to build the right product for the target user. This article shares valuable lessons on multi-product strategies, emphasizing factors like timing, customer discovery, and hiring for potential.

articles.title: HOW TO THINK MORE CRITICALLY ABOUT MARKET SIZING
THE BEST WAY TO DRIVE DEMAND IN MARKETPLACES IS HIDING IN PLAIN SIGHT
articles.summary: Balancing supply and demand is crucial for marketplace businesses when optimizing network effects and sustaining organic growth. Focus on driving supply to generate demand within an optimal range known as the "Goldilocks Zone."

articles.title: YOU SHOULD BE PLAYING WITH GPTS AT WORK
articles.summary: GPTs (Generative Pre-trained Transformers) can enhance productivity and innovation across various functions in the workplace. From automating routine tasks to generating insightful data analysis, GPTs offer customizable solutions that can drive efficiency and foster creative problem-solving in day-to-day operations.

articles.title: PRODUCT ADOPTION STRATEGY: HOW TO GET YOUR USERS CRAVING MORE
articles.summary: This guide to crafting a successful product adoption strategy includes advice on conducting detailed user segmentation, engaging in strategic experimentation, implementing a personalized and continuous onboarding process, accurately measuring data, and gathering user feedback.

articles.title: HOW PRODUCT MANAGERS CAN GIVE—AND GET—QUALITY PEER FEEDBACK
articles.summary: This article provides tips to enhance feedback exchange. When giving feedback, seek consent, understand your audience, acknowledge discomfort, and balance directness with kindness. To improve at receiving feedback, embrace a growth mindset, foster curiosity, distinguish personal identity from performance, and frequently solicit feedback.

articles.title: 10 CASE STUDIES ON LEADERSHIP, STRATEGY, AND EXECUTION
articles.summary: This collection of case studies provides valuable insights into leadership, strategy, and execution, covering topics from mastering product execution to the role of a Chief Product Officer and bridging the gap between design and business.

articles.title: APPLYING PRODUCT MANAGEMENT PRINCIPLES TO LIFE (32 MINUTE PODCAST)
articles.summary: This podcast discusses product management principles that can be applied to your personal life, such prioritization frameworks, identifying "values" or "North Star metrics" for life decisions, and adopting a product discovery mindset to have more genuine conversations.

articles.title: HOW AVAILABILITY HEURISTICS SHAPE PRODUCT THINKING
articles.summary: Availability heuristics, a psychological phenomenon where people value readily available memories over relevance, shape product thinking and influence decision-making. Understanding and mitigating their effects as a product manager improves user experience.

articles.title: SOCIAL PROOF… WHY PEOPLE’S BEHAVIORS AFFECT OUR ACTIONS
articles.summary: This case study explores the concept of social proof, where individuals look to others' actions to guide their own decisions. It examines user psychology concepts related to social proof, including the influence of word of mouth, the halo effect, and authority bias.

articles.title: PRODUCT AND MARKETING SYNCHRONIZATION
articles.summary: Product and marketing timelines don’t always have to be synchronized.

articles.title: 5 DIFFERENT TYPES OF DEBT THAT CAN HINDER YOUR PRODUCT ORGANIZATION
articles.summary: This article analyzes five types of debt: technical, product, organizational, vision, and revenue. The first step to managing these debts involves recognizing and mapping out their impacts and prioritizing them based on associated costs and risks.
